programs.title: Evil Lives Here: The Killer Speaks
programs.desc: During the day, Lorenzo Gilyard is a soft-spoken and well-liked man, but at night, he's a monster, preying on women; his best friend, a trained social worker, misses the signs; going inside the prison to get answers from the notorious serial killer.

programs.title: Evil Lives Here: The Killer Speaks
programs.desc: Michelle looks up to her father, but over time, fear and disgust replaces respect; as a teen, her world changes forever as horrific revelations buried for years finally emerge; Michelle's father must answer for his crimes.

programs.title: Homicide City
programs.desc: A skeleton is discovered on the edge of a high school football field, during a game of catch. It takes a forensic sculptor, tireless detective work, and some luck, to finally bring the mysterious killer to justice.

programs.title: Homicide City
programs.desc: A birthday ends in tragedy when a beloved family is found brutally murdered; detectives are left in the dark until a chance encounter changes everything.

programs.title: Homicide City
programs.desc: A 17-year-old aspiring artist is found dead in an abandoned house; a devastated family worries the case will never be solved, but 13 years later a lucky break in DNA technology points detectives in the right direction.

programs.title: Body Cam
programs.desc: A police officer tracks down an armed carjacker and comes under heavy fire; a stabbing in broad daylight forces the police to take decisive action; a routine traffic stop results in a shot officer who fights for his life.
